title: Brawl Box
description: The chests from the Brawl Stars game
body:
______________________________________________________________________________ |**"_Brawl Box Chests_ " is a resource pack that changes the appearance of regular and large chests from Minecraft to Brawl Box and Mega Box from Brawl Stars game. This pack has two versions, one for Forge (requires Optifine to work) and another for Fabric (requires ETF, EMF, and other Fabric attributes to work correctly).** |:---:|
|**This resource pack is also planned to be updated soon and bring much more content from Brawl Stars to Minecraft in the future.** |:---:|
``` Works with 1.19.2 and above ``` |If you encounter any bugs or problems with my pack, you can write to me on my Twitter/X and I will definitely try to help you! |:---:| ______________________________________________________________________________
